title: ampacus latifolia
intro: Ampacus latifolia, also known as the 'Tree Marigold', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Ampacus latifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infections, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of Ampacus latifolia can be made into teas, salves, or tinctures, and are often used topically to soothe and calm skin irritations.
